meta.default: AS Vertex — Professional web development with Python, Flask, JavaScript, HTML and CSS.
footer.desc: Professional web development with Python, Flask, HTML, CSS and JavaScript.
index.title: AS Vertex — Professional Web Development
index.hero.p: We build fast, modern, functional web applications — from design to server. With Python, Flask and JavaScript.
index.comp.title: What we build
index.comp.sub: Architecture built for speed, quality and real scalability.
index.comp.card1.p: Responsive, accessible, optimized interfaces. They look perfect on any device from the very first render.
index.comp.card2.p: REST APIs with Flask, JWT authentication, relational databases and business logic ready to scale.
index.comp.card3.p: We use the right tools for each project — no over-engineering, no compromise on quality.
index.proc.title: From idea to live website
index.proc.sub: Four clear steps, no surprises, with results from day one.
index.proc.p1.d: We learn about your business, your goals and what you need your website to do.
index.proc.p2.d: Visual wireframe and Flask architecture before writing a single line of code.
index.proc.p3.d: HTML/CSS/JS frontend + Python Flask backend + database, with constant updates.
index.proc.p4.d: Server deployment, domain setup and 30 days of support included.
index.cta.p: Tell us your idea — we'll get back to you within 24 hours with a proposal.
serv.title: Services — AS Vertex
serv.meta: Professional web development: Landing Pages, Full Websites, Backend, Blog/CMS and Maintenance. Find what your business needs.
serv.header.p1: You don't need to know tech to choose. Read each option as if you were asking yourself:
serv.header.p2: — and click the one that sounds most like you.
serv.guia.h: Not sure which one to pick?
serv.guia.link: write to us and we'll guide you free of charge
serv.guia.p2: Tell us what you want to achieve with your business and we'll tell you exactly what you need.
serv.lp.h: I have something specific to promote
serv.lp.p: A single page designed to make people call you, message you or buy. No distractions. No unnecessary menus. Just your message and a button.
serv.fs.h: I want my whole business online
serv.fs.p: Your complete digital presence: design, server, database, domain and deployment. You give us the idea — we deliver everything up and running.
serv.cms.h: I want to publish content myself
serv.cms.p: A website with a social-media-style panel where you (without knowing how to code) upload news, articles, products or events whenever you want.
serv.fe.h: My site exists but looks bad
serv.fe.p: We redesign or build the visual side of your site or system. Ideal if you already have something running but the design got old, slow or doesn't look right on mobile.
serv.be.h: I need my site to do things
serv.be.p: Users signing up, orders being saved, data being processed. If your site needs "memory" or internal logic, this is what you need.
serv.mant.h: I have a site, I want someone to look after it
serv.mant.p: We make sure your site is always online, secure and up to date. You focus on your business, we handle the technical side.
serv.faq.h: Still not sure which one is yours? Answer this:
serv.faq.q1: "I want people to find me when they search for my service on Google"
serv.faq.q2: "I want to upload my own articles, products or news"
serv.faq.q3: "My site already exists but it looks ugly or is broken"
serv.faq.q4: "I want users to be able to sign up or place orders"
lp.title: Landing Page — AS Vertex
lp.meta: A single page that turns visits into clients. For dentists, restaurants, coaches, campaigns and any business that wants more leads.
lp.hero.p: Imagine a salesperson available 24/7 who does just one thing: convincing whoever arrives to call you, message you or buy from you. That's a landing page.
lp.que.title: One page. One goal. No distractions.
lp.que.p1: A landing page is not a regular website. It has no menu with a thousand options, no "About us" section, no blog. It has one single thing: your offer and a button for the visitor to act.
lp.que.p2: It's perfect when you run ads on Facebook or Instagram, when you have a seasonal promotion, or when you simply want people to contact you without getting lost browsing around.
lp.que.p3a: The difference with a full website is simple: a landing page has a single goal, it's built faster and costs less. If you want to show your whole business — services, story, team, blog — that's a
lp.quien.title: Do you identify with any of these cases?
lp.quien.c1d: I want my patients to be able to book appointments online, without having to call.
lp.quien.c2d: I want to show my menu and let people order delivery or book a table.
lp.quien.c3d: I offer a service and want people to leave their info so I can contact them.
lp.quien.c4d: I'm paying for ads on Facebook/Google and I need a page that converts that traffic.
lp.quien.c5d: I want my clients to see my services and prices and contact me on WhatsApp.
lp.quien.c6d: I just launched something and I want people to discover it and buy or pre-order it.
lp.quien.extra_p: It doesn't matter — if you have something to promote and want people to act, a landing page works.

fe.title: Website Redesign — AS Vertex
fe.meta: Your site exists but looks bad, is outdated or doesn't work on mobile. We redesign it completely without touching your content or your server.
fe.h1b: Let's make it worthy of your business.
fe.hero.p: We redesign the visual side of your current website — without throwing away what works, without changing your server. We just make it look professional and work perfectly on every device.
fe.hero.cta: I want to redesign my site →
fe.que.title: A "makeover" for your website — but professional
fe.que.p1: Frontend design is the visual side of your site: the colors, the typography, how sections are laid out, how fast it loads and how it looks on mobile. It's what visitors see and feel when they arrive.
fe.que.p2: This service is for businesses that already have a working site but the design got old, was never finished properly, or simply doesn't look professional. We redesign without touching the server or the internal logic — we only improve what you see.
fe.que.p3a: If you don't have a website yet, what you need is a
fe.que.p3b: — which includes design and everything else from scratch.
fe.sintomas.s1: Your site doesn't look good on mobile
fe.sintomas.s2: It takes more than 3 seconds to load
fe.sintomas.s3: The design is more than 3 years old
fe.sintomas.s4: It's missing your current logo or colors
fe.sintomas.s5: It looks different in different browsers
fe.sintomas.s6: Your competition has something more modern
fe.despues.s1: Looks perfect on phone, tablet and PC
fe.despues.s3: Modern design aligned with your brand
fe.despues.s4: Builds more trust with your visitors
fe.quien.title: Does any of these cases sound familiar?
fe.quien.c1t: Your site was built years ago
fe.quien.c1d: The design no longer reflects what your business is today. You want something current without starting over from scratch.
fe.quien.c2t: It doesn't look good on mobile
fe.quien.c2d: More than 70% of your visitors come from their phones. If it doesn't look good there, you're losing clients.
fe.quien.c3d: You have developers who manage the server, but they need a designer to handle the visual side.
fe.quien.c4t: It loaded slowly and hurt you on Google
fe.quien.c4d: Google penalizes slow sites. We optimize the design so it loads fast and improves your ranking.
fe.quien.c5d: Your company has an internal application or platform with an interface that needs a redesign.
fe.quien.c6t: You want a more professional image
fe.quien.c6d: Your business grew and the current site no longer represents you. You need something up to par.

be.title: Logic & Databases — AS Vertex
be.meta: Does your site need to store information, manage users or run calculations? We build the engine that makes all of that work, with Python and Flask.
be.h1b: do things, not just look pretty
be.hero.p: When someone signs up, places an order or fills out a form — where does that information go? If you don't have an answer, you need a backend. We build it.
be.que.title: The "memory" and brain of your website
be.que.p1: A basic website only displays information — like a digital brochure. But if you need it to do something — store data, process orders, manage user accounts, send automatic emails — that requires a backend.
be.que.p2: The backend is the server and database working behind your site, invisible to the user but essential for everything to work. We build it with Python and Flask: fast, secure and easy to maintain.
be.que.p3a: If you're starting from scratch, what you probably need is the
be.que.p3b: which already includes design and backend together.
be.quien.title: You need it if your site has to…
be.quien.c1d: So form submissions don't just reach your inbox but get saved in a database you can consult whenever you want.
be.quien.c2t: Have users with their own accounts
be.quien.c2d: So each person has their own login, history, orders or personalized profile.
be.quien.c3d: So when someone books an appointment, places an order or reserves a table, the system records and manages it.
be.quien.c4d: Confirmations, reminders, notifications — the system sends them on its own without you doing anything.
be.quien.c5d: WhatsApp Business, Mercado Pago, Stripe, Google Calendar, Mailchimp — integrations with external services.
be.quien.c6t: Manage inventory or a dynamic catalog
be.quien.c6d: So products, prices or availability can be updated from a panel and instantly reflected on the site.
be.inc.title: A complete, documented and secure system
be.inc.c1i1: Processes and stores your form data
be.inc.c1i2: Manages user accounts with secure login
be.inc.c1i4: Connects your site with external apps (API)

be.inc.c2i3: The data is yours, accessible whenever you want
be.inc.c3i1: Encrypted passwords, never in plain text
be.inc.c3i2: Each user only sees their own data
be.inc.c3i3: Protection against common attacks (SQL injection, CSRF)
be.inc.c3i4: Credentials in environment variables, never in the code
be.inc.c4i2: Clear instructions on how to use it

be.plan2.desc: For sites where each person has their own account.
be.plan2.f3: Each user sees their own data

be.cta.p: Tell us what you want your site to do. We'll get back to you within 24 hours with exactly what you need.

fs.title: Full Website — AS Vertex
fs.meta: You don't have a website, or the one you have no longer works. We build everything from scratch: design, server, database and deployment. You just give us the idea.
fs.hero.p: You don't have a website, or the one you have no longer represents your business. We take care of everything — design, server, domain and deployment. You just approve and we launch.
fs.que.title: Everything you need to exist online — in a single project
fs.que.p1: A full website is not just a pretty page. It's the design your clients see, the server that keeps it online, the database that stores the information and the domain that identifies it. All of that together.
fs.que.p2: With this service you don't have to coordinate different people for each part — we do everything and hand you the site working, published and ready to receive clients.
fs.que.p3: It's the ideal service if you're starting from zero or want to completely rebuild your digital presence.
fs.que.parte1d: What your clients see: colors, typography, sections, images. Adapted to every device.
fs.que.parte2d: What keeps your site online and stores all the information securely.
fs.que.parte3d: Your address on the internet (www.yourbusiness.com), configured and published by us.

cms.title: Website with Admin Panel — AS Vertex
cms.meta: Publish news, articles, products or events from your phone or computer, without knowing how to code. Your own control panel, built to fit you.
cms.hero.p: A website with its own control panel. You log in, write what you want to publish, upload a photo and hit publish — that simple. No coding required. No depending on anyone.
cms.que.title: Like posting on Instagram, but on your own site
cms.que.p1: This service gives you two things at once: the website your clients see, and a private panel where you control the content — no need to call a developer every time you want to change something.
cms.que.p2: It's like having your own WordPress, but built exactly for what you need — faster, more secure, and without the plugins and problems WordPress brings.
cms.que.p3: Think of it as a private social network for your business: you log in, you publish, and your clients instantly see it on your site.
cms.panel.a1: Write and edit articles or news
cms.panel.a6: Give your team access with permissions
cms.panel.a7: See how many people visit your site
cms.quien.title: You need it if your business…
cms.quien.c1d: You have news, articles, recipes, tutorials, success stories — and you want to publish them whenever you want, not when someone else does it for you.
cms.quien.c2d: Your products, services or prices change frequently. You need to update your site yourself, not pay for every change.
cms.quien.c3d: Your designer, community manager or assistant can each publish on the site with their own permissions.
cms.quien.c4t: Wants to show up on Google
cms.quien.c4d: Publishing content regularly is the most effective strategy to improve your Google ranking without paying for ads.
cms.quien.c5d: Fairs, workshops, seasonal offers — you publish them yourself whenever you want and remove them when they end.
cms.quien.c6t: Already has WordPress and is fed up
cms.quien.c6d: Slow, full of breaking plugins, hacked. We build you something clean, yours, without the WordPress headaches.

port.title: Portfolio — AS Vertex
port.meta: Web engineering projects developed by AS Vertex with robust architectures in Python, Flask, JavaScript and SQL.
port.header.p: Projects developed with a focus on code quality, scalability and well-structured databases.
port.p1.desc: Platform for hospital management and pharmacy administration, automating medical schedules and prescription validation. Note: This system is strictly an academic school project deliverable; it is not hosted on its own server nor managed in production.
port.p2.desc: Landing page and platform designed for the real estate sector. Focused on delivering a smooth user experience, responsive navigation and an attractive visual presentation for B2C.
port.p3.desc: Diagnostic tool designed to evaluate the security configuration of web servers. It analyzes response headers to identify vulnerabilities and automate technical audits.
port.p4.desc: Library specialized in the development of optimized user interface components. It integrates modular styles, complex layouts and layout best practices ready for implementation.
port.cta.h: Do you have a technical project in mind?
port.cta.p: We build solid architectures. Tell us what you need to develop.
nos.title: About — AS Vertex
nos.meta: Meet the team behind AS Vertex — engineers passionate about clean code and scalable software architecture.
nos.header.p: We are software developers focused on solving operational problems through first-class technical architecture.
nos.mision.title: Who are we?
nos.mision.p1: At AS Vertex we apply our rigorous technical training to build web solutions that don't just look good, but are grounded in solid programming logic.
nos.mision.p2: We stay away from generic solutions and prefabricated templates. We specialize in building efficient architectures from scratch, delivering robust, secure systems ready to scale as your business grows.
nos.mision.p3: We use a proven tech stack: Python, Flask, SQL databases, and a structured frontend with pure HTML, CSS and JavaScript. No fragile dependencies, just efficient code.
nos.val.title: Our technical foundation
nos.val.sub: Engineering principles applied to every line of code we write.
nos.val.v1d: We write code you can read, understand and scale. We apply clear design patterns and avoid "black boxes".
nos.val.v2d: No middlemen or account executives. You talk directly with the engineers building your project.
nos.val.v3d: We optimize database queries and user flows. A fast site is essential for retaining users.
nos.val.v4d: We implement best practices from the architecture up: strict validation, environment variable control and JWT.
nos.val.v5d: We deliver clean Git repositories, a detailed README and deployment instructions so you keep full control.
nos.val.v6d: We design relational (SQL) schemas built for long-term data integrity.
nos.cta.h: Looking for a solid technical team?
nos.cta.p: Let's talk about the architecture of your next project. No strings attached.
proc.title: Process — AS Vertex
proc.meta: How we work at AS Vertex: from discovery to deployment, with 6 months of maintenance included.
proc.header.p: No black boxes, no surprises. From the first meeting to the final deployment, you'll know exactly what phase your web engineering project is in.
proc.f1.desc: We start with a strategic call to deeply understand your business logic. We don't ask generic questions; we gather the exact technical requirements your system needs to be profitable.
proc.f2.desc: Before coding, we design the foundations. We deliver a visual wireframe and the technical structure of the database and the API. We approve everything on paper before writing the first line of code.
proc.f3.desc: We build your application in iterative cycles. You get access to a staging environment where you can see and test the code live as we connect the frontend with the backend.
proc.f3.d4: Regular reviews on the staging server
proc.f4.desc: We put the system through stress tests. We review endpoint security and frontend loading speed, and we guarantee everything works perfectly on any device.
proc.f4.d1: Testing across multiple browsers and devices
proc.f5.desc: We prepare the production environment. We configure the server, install security certificates (SSL) and connect your domain. The source code is 100% yours.
proc.f5.d4: Delivery of the Git repository with all the code
proc.f6.desc: We stand behind our code. We give you 6 months of free technical support to guarantee the platform's stability. Afterwards, we offer maintenance plans tailored to the scale of your project.
proc.gar.title: Technical commitment
proc.gar.g1d: All source code and databases belong to you from day one. No commercial strings attached.
proc.gar.g2d: If anything we programmed fails, we fix it at no cost. We stand behind the quality of our software.
proc.gar.g3d: The technical quote we approve is final. No hidden costs or surprises mid-development.
proc.cta.h: Ready to take your idea to production?
proc.cta.p: The first step is a free assessment. Tell us what you need to build.

mant.title: Website Maintenance — AS Vertex
mant.meta: We keep your site online, secure and up to date: backups, monitoring, security updates and monthly technical support so you can focus only on your business.
mant.h1b: we take care of your site
mant.hero.p: A website isn't built once and forgotten: it needs backups, security updates and someone to respond when something breaks. That's what we handle for you, every month.
mant.que.title: A well-kept site doesn't fail at the worst moment
mant.que.p1: Website maintenance is the invisible work that keeps your site fast, secure and online 24/7. Without it, a site becomes slow, vulnerable to attacks and, sooner or later, goes down right when you need it most.
mant.que.p2: We take care of automatic backups, updates, monitoring and fixes. If something breaks, we fix it — usually before your customers even notice.
mant.que.p3a: Don't have a site yet? First we build your
mant.que.p3b: and then we maintain it for you.
mant.quien.title: This service is for you if…
mant.quien.c1t: You have no time for the technical side
mant.quien.c1d: You'd rather run your business and let someone else handle the site.
mant.quien.c2d: We built it or someone else did, and you want to keep it healthy.
mant.quien.c3d: You'd rather pay a fixed monthly fee than a costly bill for every emergency.
mant.quien.c4t: You sell or get clients online
mant.quien.c4d: Every minute your site is down is money you're not making.
mant.quien.c5d: You want protection against hacks, spam and vulnerabilities.
mant.quien.c6d: You need minor changes (text, images, prices) without the hassle.
mant.inc.title: Everything your monthly plan includes
mant.inc.c1i1: Monitoring that your site stays online
mant.inc.c1i3: Fast restore in case of failure
mant.inc.c4i1: Technical support by email and WhatsApp

mant.plan1.desc: For small sites or landing pages that just need to stay healthy and secure.
mant.plan2.desc: For active business sites that receive clients and change often.
mant.plan3.desc: For platforms with a backend, high traffic or special requirements.
mant.cta.h: Ready to stop worrying about your site?
mant.cta.p: Tell us what site you have and we'll recommend the ideal plan. No commitment.
priv.title: Privacy Notice — AS Vertex
priv.meta: AS Vertex Comprehensive Privacy Notice in accordance with the Mexican Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties.
priv.intro: This Privacy Notice is issued in compliance with the Mexican Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties (LFPDPPP), its Regulations, and other applicable provisions. Its purpose is to clearly inform you about the processing we will give to the personal data you provide, as well as the rights the law grants you as the data subject.
priv.s1.h: 1. Identity and address of the data controller
priv.s1.p1: AS Vertex (hereinafter, "AS Vertex", "we", or the "Controller") is responsible for the processing of your personal data, in accordance with article 15 of the LFPDPPP.
priv.s1.p2: For any matter related to the processing of your personal data or to exercise your rights, you may contact us at the following email address:
priv.s2.intro: For the purposes described in this Notice, we may collect the following categories of personal data, either directly through our forms and emails, or indirectly through tracking technologies on our website:
priv.s2.cat1.i2: Position or role within your organization
priv.s2.cat3.i1: Name of the business, brand, or project
priv.s2.cat3.i3: Technical requirements and content for the development
priv.s2.sensibles: We do not request sensitive personal data. Under article 3 of the LFPDPPP, sensitive data is that which may reveal aspects such as racial origin, health status, genetic information, religious beliefs, political opinions, or sexual preference. If, during a project, you decide to share information of this nature with us, we will request your express written consent before processing it.
priv.s3.p1: Respond to requests for information, quotes, and contact that you send us.
priv.s3.p2: Formalize and carry out the contractual relationship for the provision of our services.
priv.s3.p3: Design, develop, deliver, and maintain the contracted web projects.
priv.s3.p4: Provide the contracted hosting services and inform you of technical matters, incidents, or renewals.
priv.s3.p5: Issue receipts, invoicing, and comply with applicable tax and legal obligations.
priv.s3.s1: Sending informational communications about new services, promotions, or content.
priv.s3.s2: Requesting testimonials or success stories for portfolio and outreach purposes.
priv.s3.s3: Internal statistical analysis to improve the quality of our services and website.
priv.s4.intro: As the data subject, you have at all times the right to Access, Rectify, Cancel, or Object to the processing of your data (ARCO rights), as well as to revoke the consent you may have granted us.
priv.s4.arco1.d: Know what personal data we hold about you and the details of its processing.
priv.s4.arco2.d: Request the correction of your data when it is inaccurate or incomplete.
priv.s4.arco3.d: Request that your data be removed from our records when it is no longer necessary.
priv.s4.arco4.d: Object to the use of your personal data for specific purposes.
priv.s4.como.h: How to exercise your ARCO rights?
priv.s4.como.p: You must send a request to the email address
priv.s4.como.p2: with the subject "Exercise of ARCO rights". Your request must contain the following information and documentation:
priv.s4.como.r1: Full name of the data subject and an email address to receive a response.
priv.s4.como.r2: Official document proving your identity (or that of the representative, where applicable).
priv.s4.como.r3: Clear and precise description of the data and of the right you wish to exercise.
priv.s4.como.plazo: We will respond to your request within a maximum of twenty business days from its receipt, in accordance with article 32 of the LFPDPPP. Should the request be deemed valid, we will make it effective within the following fifteen business days.
priv.s5.h: 5. Limitation of use, disclosure, and revocation of consent
priv.s5.intro: You may at any time limit the use or disclosure of your personal data, or revoke the consent you have granted us for processing with secondary purposes. To do so, send a request to our contact email expressly indicating:
priv.s5.i1: That you wish to stop receiving commercial or promotional communications.
priv.s5.i2: That you withdraw your authorization to use your testimonial or project in the portfolio.
priv.s5.i3: That you request the exclusion of your data from internal statistical analysis.
priv.s5.i4: Any other specific limitation on the processing of your data.
priv.s5.nota: The revocation of secondary purposes will not affect the provision of the services you already have contracted with us.
priv.s6.h: 6. Use of cookies and tracking technologies
priv.s6.intro: Our website uses cookies and similar technologies in order to improve your browsing experience. Cookies are small text files stored on your device that allow user preferences to be identified.
priv.s6.c1.d: Necessary for the operation of the site, including session handling and language selection. They cannot be disabled without affecting basic functionality.
priv.s6.c2.d: They allow us to understand, in aggregate, how the site is used in order to improve it. They do not identify the user directly.
priv.s6.nota: You can configure your browser to block or delete cookies at any time. Please consult your browser's help section for the applicable procedure.
priv.s7.p: AS Vertex does not transfer or sell your personal data to third parties for purposes other than the provision of the contracted service. Your data may be shared only with technology providers acting as data processors (for example, hosting or email infrastructure services), who are contractually obligated to maintain the confidentiality of the information. It may also be transferred when there is a requirement from a competent authority, under the terms established by applicable law.
priv.s8.p: AS Vertex reserves the right to modify this Notice at any time to reflect legal, operational, or processing-practice changes. Any modification will be published on this same page, indicating the date of the last update. We recommend that you review it periodically. Continued use of our services and website after publication will imply acceptance of the current Notice.
term.title: Terms & Conditions — AS Vertex
term.meta: Terms & Conditions governing the contracting of AS Vertex's web design and development services.
term.intro: These Terms & Conditions (the "Terms") govern the provision of the web design and development, maintenance, and hosting services offered by AS Vertex, as well as the use of its website. By contracting any of our services or using this site, the Client states that they have read, understood, and accepted the full content of these Terms, pursuant to article 1803 of the Federal Civil Code.
term.s1.prest.p: AS Vertex, a Mexican web design and development agency (hereinafter, "AS Vertex" or the "Provider"), with contact email:
term.s1.cli.p: The individual or legal entity that contracts any of the services offered by AS Vertex, whether directly through an accepted quote or through the website.
term.s2.intro: AS Vertex offers the following services, whose specific scope will be determined in the quote, proposal, or contract corresponding to each project:
term.s2.srv1.d: Creation of landing pages, complete websites, blogs, content management systems, and frontend redesign projects, tailored to the Client's needs.
term.s2.srv2.d: Implementation of server-side functionality, integrations with external services, forms, and databases, in accordance with the scope defined in the quote.
term.s2.srv3.d: Updates, improvements, monitoring, and ongoing technical support for the site under a monthly subscription or contracted-hours scheme.
term.s2.srv4.d: Provision of the site's hosting space on the infrastructure that AS Vertex determines, under a monthly or annual subscription scheme. The registration and ownership of the internet domain corresponds exclusively to the Client and must be managed and paid for by them with the registrar of their choice.
term.s3.p1.d: The Client sends their requirements and AS Vertex prepares a quote with scope, timelines, and costs.
term.s3.p2.d: Written acceptance of the quote (email or signature) and payment of the agreed deposit start the project and formalize the contract.
term.s3.p3.d: The project is developed according to the agreed scope, with the rounds of revision established in the proposal. Changes outside the scope will be billed separately.
term.s3.p4.d: Once the project is approved and the balance settled, AS Vertex carries out the delivery and publication of the site as agreed.
term.s4.i1: Provide the services with professional diligence and quality.
term.s4.i2: Respect the agreed delivery timelines, except in cases of unforeseeable circumstances or force majeure.
term.s4.i3: Maintain timely communication with the Client throughout the project.
term.s4.i4: Keep confidential the information the Client shares.
term.s4.i5: Deliver the files, credentials, and accesses corresponding to the project once settled.
term.s4.i6: Apply reasonable information security measures in accordance with industry standards.
term.s5.intro: For the correct execution of the project, the Client agrees to:
term.s5.i1: Provide, in a timely manner, the information, content, images, texts, credentials, and materials necessary for the development of the project.
term.s5.i2: Guarantee that all content they deliver is their property or that they have the necessary authorizations for its use, releasing AS Vertex from any claim for infringement of third-party rights.
term.s5.i3: Comply with payments and deposits on the agreed dates, as well as with the timely contracting and renewal of the domain in their name.
term.s5.nota: The Client's delay in sending information or materials may affect delivery timelines, without this implying any liability for AS Vertex.
term.s6.cli.p: Once 100% of the project has been paid, the Client acquires the economic rights of use and exploitation over the graphic design, custom content, and source code developed specifically for their project, in accordance with the Federal Copyright Law. Until then, such elements remain the property of AS Vertex.
term.s6.av.p: AS Vertex retains ownership of its brand, methodologies, base templates, proprietary libraries, internal tools, and any component pre-existing to the project or of general use in its operation.
term.s6.nota: The Client authorizes AS Vertex to include the delivered project in its portfolio and outreach materials for demonstrative purposes, unless expressly agreed otherwise in writing.
term.s7.intro: AS Vertex will provide its services with due professional diligence; however, it will not be liable in the following cases:
term.s7.i1: Failures or interruptions of the site derived from third-party services (domain, external providers, payment platforms, APIs).
term.s7.i2: Modifications, updates, or interventions made by the Client or by third parties without AS Vertex's authorization.
term.s7.i3: Loss of information derived from the failure to renew the domain or from services outside the hosting provided by AS Vertex.
term.s7.i4: Indirect damages, loss of profits, or loss of commercial opportunities.
term.s7.i5: Cases of unforeseeable circumstances or force majeure in accordance with article 2111 of the Federal Civil Code.
term.s8.c1.d: Projects require a minimum deposit of 50% of the total value to begin work, unless otherwise agreed in writing.
term.s8.c2.d: The remaining balance is settled upon delivery and approval of the project, prior to publication or delivery of final files.
term.s8.c3.d: Maintenance and hosting services are billed in advance according to the contracted frequency. Failure to pay on time entitles AS Vertex to suspend the service after notice by email.
term.s8.c4.d: If the Client cancels the project once started, the deposit paid will not be refundable, as it covers the professional work performed up to that point. AS Vertex will deliver the progress made as of the cancellation date.
term.s9.p: Either party may terminate the project or the recurring services by notice via email with at least fifteen calendar days in advance, without any liability beyond the obligations already accrued. Upon termination of the recurring services, the Client will be responsible for migrating the site to the infrastructure of their choice.
term.s9.nota: AS Vertex may terminate the relationship immediately in the event of payment default, unlawful use of the services, or serious breach of these Terms by the Client.
term.s10.p: These Terms are governed by the federal laws of the United Mexican States. For the interpretation, execution, and fulfillment thereof, the parties expressly submit to the jurisdiction of the competent courts of Mexico City, waiving any other jurisdiction that may correspond to them by reason of their present or future domiciles. In the event of any discrepancy between the Spanish version and any translation, the Spanish version shall prevail.
flash.enviado: Message sent! We'll reply within 24 hours.
flash.error_guardar: There was a problem saving your message. Please try again.
e404.title: Page not found — AS Vertex
e404.p: This page doesn't exist or was moved. But we can take you where you need to go.
